description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and legacy, and a global before_script that runs `uname -a`. In the build stage define jobs clang-3.9 (image debian:stretch, script ./tools/ci/jobs/clang39.sh --enable-werror), clang-3.9-i386 (image i386/debian:unstable, same script), clang-6 (debian:unstable), clang-6-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), clang-7 (debian:unstable), clang-7-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), clang-8 (debian:unstable), clang-8-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), clang-10 (debian:unstable), clang-10-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), gcc-4.6 (debian:wheezy), gcc-4.8 (debian:jessie), gcc-4.8-lto (debian:jessie), gcc-4.9 (debian:jessie), gcc-4.9-lto (debian:jessie), gcc-6 (debian:stretch), gcc-6-i386 (i386/debian:stretch), gcc-7 (debian:unstable), gcc-7-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), gcc-8 (debian:unstable), gcc-8-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), gcc-9 (debian:unstable), gcc-9-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), gcc-snapshot (debian:unstable), gcc-snapshot-i386 (i386/debian:unstable), each running their respective ./tools/ci/jobs/<compiler>.sh with --enable-werror and optional flags (--enable-lto, --enable-sanitize) as defined. In the test stage add jobs gcc-5-lto, gcc-5-sanitize, gcc-5_lto-sanitize, gcc-7-sanitize, gcc-7_lto, gcc-7_lto-sanitize, gcc-8-sanitize, gcc-8_lto, gcc-8_lto-sanitize, gcc-9-sanitize, gcc-9_lto, gcc-9_lto-sanitize, gcc-4.8-sanitize, gcc-4.8_lto-sanitize, gcc-4.9-sanitize, gcc-4.9_lto-sanitize, gcc-6-sanitize, gcc-6_lto, gcc-6_lto-sanitize, gcc-snapshot-sanitize, gcc-snapshot_lto-sanitize, each using the appropriate debian or i386 image and running the corresponding script with the listed flags. In the legacy stage add jobs gcc-5_unstable_lto-sanitize, gcc-4.8_stable_lto-sanitize, gcc-6_unstable_lto-sanitize, each using debian:jessie or debian:stretch images and running the same scripts with --enable-werror --enable-lto --enable-sanitize. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
